title: Moving to Greater Noida: The Ultimate Student Guide
excerpt: A comprehensive guide on what to pack, where to eat, metro connectivity, and finding the perfect hostel in Greater Noida.
content: Moving to a new city can be intimidating, especially for students starting their college journey. Greater Noida is a beautifully planned educational hub, but it has its own quirks. In this guide, we cover the top tips for moving, metro connectivity (Aqua Line), student hangouts near Pari Chowk, and how Saraswati Niwas provides the ultimate student accommodation experience.
author: Saraswati Editorial

title: Hostel vs PG vs Co-Living: Which is Right for You?
excerpt: Breaking down the differences in cost, amenities, community, and security to help you make an informed choice.
content: Are you confused between a traditional PG, a college hostel, and modern co-living spaces? We break down the differences in cost, privacy, social life, meals, and safety. Co-living spaces like Saraswati Niwas bridge the gap by offering premium amenities, tight security, and a vibrant community of peers under a single affordable rent.
author: Aditi Roy
